claim_boundary: Regulatory Phase 3 creates governance-policy scaffolds only. It does not create legally binding policies, legal advice, financial advice, tax advice, certification, compliance approval, procurement approval, production monitoring, or truth validation.

claim_safety_policy.public_claim_rule: No public-facing claim should be promoted without Claim Gauntlet, Promotion Gate, provenance, human review, and professional review where appropriate.

handling_rules: Preserve SHA-256, path, timestamp, and provenance where possible.
Do not promote private/protected artifacts to public use by default.
Do not include protected artifacts in first-send outreach.
Use Claim Gauntlet and Promotion Gate before external-facing use.
Client labels and final adjudication remain buyer-controlled.
Retain only what is needed for workflow provenance unless professional advice says otherwise.

required_review_points: before procurement, contract, budget, paid pilot, or money movement
governance_model.system_role: bounded review scaffold and documentation workflow

human_review_policy.default: Human review required for interpretation, delivery, client-facing claims, public-facing claims, and professional thresholds.

professional_review_policy.trigger: procurement, paid pilot, contract terms, budget, money movement, regulated use, protected method disclosure, public marketing claims, or certification/compliance representation

prohibited_use_policy.approval_requirement: Human review and professional/legal review where needed before any sensitive or regulated use.

protected_methods_policy.default: Do not disclose protected methods by default.
protected_methods_policy.release_condition: Only disclose exact protected artifacts after human approval and lawyer-reviewed confidentiality/non-use terms.

purpose: Create governance-policy scaffolds for prohibited use, human review, data handling, retention, protected methods, and claim safety.

retention_policy_scaffold.default: Retain internal scaffold artifacts for provenance; treat client-specific/protected data as restricted and subject to client terms and professional review.
retention_policy_scaffold.deletion_or_return: Client-specific deletion/return obligations must be set in written terms and reviewed professionally.
